classData.description: Event-type tags shared across the load profile, the subjects, and the runner.
classData.name: EVENT_TYPE

classData.description: Tiny deterministic PRNG (mulberry32). Returns a closure yielding floats in [0, 1).
classData.name: mulberry32

classData.comment:
/**
 * Fixed token corpus → deterministic markdown that actually exercises the parse path
 * (inline code, emphasis, list / heading punctuation, paragraph breaks) without pulling in an
 * external fixture. Both subjects append the same content, so any latency delta is the
 * engine's, not the input's.
 * @type {String[]}
 * @private
 */
classData.description: Fixed token corpus → deterministic markdown that actually exercises the parse path (inline code, emphasis, list / heading punctuation, paragraph breaks) without pulling in an external fixture. Both subjects append the same content, so any latency delta is the engine's, not the input's.
classData.name: TOKEN_CORPUS

classData.comment:
/**
     * @param {Object} [config]
     * @param {Number} [config.seed=1]                   Seed — the same seed yields the same stream.
     * @param {Number} [config.durationMs=28800000]      Session length in ms (default 8h).
     * @param {Number} [config.appendCadenceMs=50]       Gap between streamed appends (~20/s).
     * @param {Number} [config.keystrokeCadenceMs=30000] Gap between keystroke probes (30s).
     * @param {Number} [config.minTokensPerAppend=1]     Minimum corpus tokens per append chunk.
     * @param {Number} [config.maxTokensPerAppend=4]     Maximum corpus tokens per append chunk.
     */

params.description: Seed — the same seed yields the same stream.
params.name: config.seed

classData.name: LoadProfile

classData.comment:
/**
 * @summary Reproducible benchmark load profile.
 *
 * @example
 *     const profile = new LoadProfile({seed: 42, durationMs: 8 * 60 * 60 * 1000});
 *     for (const {tMs, text} of profile.appendEvents()) { ... }  // inside the subject app
 *     const probes = profile.keystrokeTimes();                   // inside the runner
 */
classData.name: LoadProfile

params.description: Seed — the same seed yields the same stream.
params.name: config.seed

classData.description: Lazily yields the streamed markdown-append events for the whole session — a generator, so an 8h run is never materialized in memory.

names: Generator.<{tMs: Number, type: String, text: String}>

classData.name: appendEvents

classData.comment:
/**
     * The deterministic keystroke-probe schedule (fixed cadence → no PRNG needed).
     * @returns {Number[]} probe times in ms from session start.
     */
classData.description: The deterministic keystroke-probe schedule (fixed cadence → no PRNG needed).

returns.description: probe times in ms from session start.

classData.name: keystrokeTimes

classData.description: Total streamed-append count for the configured session. Handy for runner progress, and the natural determinism-assertion target in a test (same seed + config → same count).
classData.name: appendCount
